title: Samurai X Addon
description: An Addon for ThreeCore, or LucraftCore
body:
**This is not installed like a regular mod, instead follow this guide:** 

https://youtu.be/d36qSLCkmXI 

**It works the same for 1.12.2 and 1.16.5, just with a different Core Mod these being LucraftCore (1.12.2) and ThreeCore (1.16.5)**


Welcome to the Samurai X Addon. As you can read by the name, this addon adds the different Samurai X suits. Each Suit grants a boost in Jump Stats, Sprinting Speed, etc.

 

**Current Suit List:**

Samurai X (2012)

Samurai X (2014)

Samurai X (2015)

Samurai X (2017)

Samurai X (2018)

Samurai X (Legacy)

 

**Current Superpower List:**

Master of Lightning Superpower (only in 1.12.2)

 
**For the 1.12.2 Version, you require LucraftCore as well as HeroesExpansion**
**For the 1.16.5 Version, you require ThreeCore**
